name: UBA : Non-Standard User Accessing AWS Resources
notes: Detects a non-standard user who is attempting to access Amazon Web Services (AWS) resources.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches all of the following AWS Cloud: S3 Bucket accessed by Non-Standard User
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Non-Standard User Accessing AWS Resources on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches all of the following AWS Cloud: S3 Bucket accessed by Non-Standard User
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Non-Standard User Accessing AWS Resources
